# Variant Classification

```{r classification_pdf_setup}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true

# Prepare a flat data frame of all classified variants for PDF output.
# Unlike the HTML report, this uses tinytable rather than reactable,
# and is limited to P/LP/VUS to keep the PDF focused.
# TODO: implement create_variant_table_pdf() in R/tables_pdf.R

variants_pdf <- cps_report$content$snv_indel$callset$variant_display$cpg_non_sf

n_path_lpath <- sum(
  variants_pdf$CLASSIFICATION %in% c("Pathogenic", "Likely Pathogenic"),
  na.rm = TRUE
)
n_vus_pdf <- sum(variants_pdf$CLASSIFICATION == "VUS", na.rm = TRUE)
```

## Pathogenic and Likely Pathogenic variants

```{r path_lpath_table}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr n_path_lpath > 0

# Placeholder: replace body with create_variant_table_pdf() call
# once R/tables_pdf.R is implemented.
variants_pdf |>
  dplyr::filter(CLASSIFICATION %in% c("Pathogenic", "Likely Pathogenic")) |>
  dplyr::select(
    SYMBOL, CONSEQUENCE, HGVSc, HGVSp,
    CLASSIFICATION, ASSERTION_AUTHORITY, VAF
  ) |>
  tinytable::tt() |>
  tinytable::theme_tt("tabular")
```

```{r path_none_msg}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr n_path_lpath == 0
cat("*No pathogenic or likely pathogenic variants identified.*")
```

## Variants of Uncertain Significance

```{r vus_table}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr n_vus_pdf > 0

variants_pdf |>
  dplyr::filter(CLASSIFICATION == "VUS") |>
  dplyr::select(
    SYMBOL, CONSEQUENCE, HGVSc, HGVSp,
    CLASSIFICATION, ASSERTION_AUTHORITY, VAF
  ) |>
  tinytable::tt() |>
  tinytable::theme_tt("tabular")
```

```{r vus_none_msg}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr n_vus_pdf == 0
cat("*No variants of uncertain significance identified.*")
```
